{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201708132E23F8D9838AD3849CA3"}"},"total":2777},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6966121294341571365","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"甜甜的没什么误会没什么乱七八糟的狗血太适合我这种上了年纪的老年人了🥰🥰重要的是长短合适文笔好文风舒适不会有那种太长太乱而导致不想继续看的感觉nice"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1621926509,"group_id":"6956948403649514510","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"朝朝暮暮朝朝","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0yQOgiIys2RWPvr+TBZM1Q=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4afad57059d24f11982ef3e2fc897597~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535745&x-signature=VMXgKRJg3GeZ5%2BFF9jjF0M8LZaI%3D","user_id":"51135295165","user_name":"浅浅言兮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"51135295165","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6956948403649514510","book_info":{"abstract":"裴焕靠脸出道，黑料如山但人气超高，堪称圈内泥石流。
最要命的是——这泥石流很爱接戏。
媒体让影帝点评流量的演技。
堪称影坛之光的祝炀薄唇轻启：他谁？不认识。
一次意外，两人互换了身体
节目录制时，制作组特意分开休息室，防止两人当场互殴。
两人不仅没打起来，还拍到以下画面：
向来冷冽霜雪的祝炀黑发微乱，把裴焕摁在墙角，嗓音低哑深沉：“宝贝，让我亲一下。”
于是，全网炸了。
#世纪破冰！？#
#我磕的死对头成cp了！？#
可可爱爱没有脑袋大明星X冷气制造机闷骚影帝
不定时互穿，死对头变爱人。
标签：灵魂转换/娱乐圈/甜宠/欢喜冤家
